objective: Define a machine-checked retained-log contract for literal proof-bar exit values without turning workflow evidence into product authority or reopening M0 capability claims.
falsifiable_claim: A proposed proof bar cannot pass when its retained log omits, duplicates, malforms, stales, or reports a non-success exit literal, even when its task process exits successfully.
dependencies: Existing unsigned M0 review hash chain
exit_criteria: Checker rejects missing, duplicate, malformed, stale, and non-success *_EXIT literals.
Evidence index content-binds the retained log while ignoring task process status.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M0_LITERAL_EXIT_EVIDENCE_CONTRACT_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Predeclare missing, duplicate, conflicting, malformed, stale, truncated, and non-success literal fixtures plus a green-process/no-literal fixture; every fixture must fail closed.
remaining_nonclaims: Unsigned workflow hash chains grant no product authority.
This proposal reopens no M0 capability claim and closes no stage.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 61eba1802992c01efa7d3188184ff315ad9d2ba0; status transaction 2026-07-22.
